message:
test(bd-2ny0): add 20 unit tests for proxy.rs

Cover ProxyCatalog debug/clone, ProxyResourceHandler read_with_uri
(params, prefix stripping, no prefix match), ProxyToolHandler/
ProxyPromptHandler definition clones, ProxyClient direct
read_resource/get_prompt/call_tool calls, handler external_name/
external_uri storage for new and with_prefix constructors,
resource_from_template with minimal fields, and ProxyClient
error propagation for read_resource/get_prompt/call_tool.

Server test count: 1000 → 1020.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
